---
title: "Wetland Complexes - vegetation"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "09/07/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)



ANAE_prop_5 <- read_excel("raw/Wetland_vege_summs_newboundary.xlsx", sheet = "Major_>5%")

ANAE_5_long <- pivot_longer(ANAE_prop_5, c("area.m2","area.ha"),"Values")
```


# MDB ANAE DATA
```{r Stacked bar plots}

# reorder ANAE_TYPE for ANAE_prop_5
ANAE_prop_5$ANAE_TYPE <- factor(ANAE_prop_5$ANAE_TYPE,levels = c( 
  "Other",
  "Lp1.1: Permanent lake",                             
  "Lt1.1: Temporary lake",
  "Rp1.4: Permanent lowland stream",
  #"Pp4.2: Permanent wetland",
  #"Pt4.1: Floodplain or riparian wetland",
  "Pt2.2.2: Temporary sedge/grass/forb marsh",
  "Pt2.3.2: Freshwater meadow",
  "Pp2.1.2: Permanent tall emergent marsh",
  "Pt1.7.1: Lignum riparian zone or floodplain", 
  "Pt1.8.1: Riparian or floodplain shrubland",
  "Pt1.8.2: Temporary shrub swamp",
  "Pt1.6.1: Riparian or floodplain woodland",
  "Pt1.4.1: River cooba riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.3.1: Coolibah riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.6.2: Temporary woodland swamp",
  "Pt1.1.1: River red gum riparian zone or floodplain",
  "Pt1.2.1: Black box riparian zone or floodplain"
  ))

ggplot(ANAE_prop_5, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=proportion, x=Wetland)) +
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() + # make horizontal
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("grey70", "#E31A1C", # red
  "green4",
  "#FF7F00", # orange
  "black", "gold1",
  "skyblue2", "#FB9A99", # lt pink
  "palegreen2",
  "#CAB2D6", # lt purple
  "#FDBF6F", # lt orange
  "khaki2",
  "darkturquoise", "dodgerblue2",
"yellow4", "brown")) +
  labs(y = "Percentage wetland area", x = "", fill = "ANAE Type") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12))

ggplot(ANAE_prop_5, aes(fill=ANAE_TYPE, y=area.ha, x=Wetland)) + 
    geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity") +
  coord_flip() + # make horizontal
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("grey70", "#E31A1C", # red
  "green4",
  "#FF7F00", # orange
  "black", "gold1",
  "skyblue2", "#FB9A99", # lt pink
  "palegreen2",
  "#CAB2D6", # lt purple
  "#FDBF6F", # lt orange
  "khaki2",
  "darkturquoise", "dodgerblue2",
"yellow4", "brown")) +
  labs(y = "Area (ha)", x = "", fill = "ANAE Type") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12))   +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12))
```
